mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user ( username, password, nickname, sex, birthday, address, info, status ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{sex}, #{birthday}, #{address}, #{info}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET nickname = #{nickname}, info = #{info}, address = #{address}, sex = #{sex}, birthday = #{birthday}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE user SET avatar = #{avatar}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE user SET password = #{password}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(address, '-', 1) as province, COUNT(*) as count FROM user WHERE address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' GROUP BY SUBSTRING_INDEX(address, '-', 1) ORDER BY count DESC
